why_it_matters: Directly describes parallel solar panels connected through vBoost DC/DC modules to a constant high-voltage DC bus with distributed MPPT.
limitations: Old non-official article; no current supplier/certification path found.

why_it_matters: Confirms current research on parallel solar power optimizer structures for high-voltage DC bus architectures and 100 W lab prototypes.
limitations: Not a product; not certified; lab scale.

why_it_matters: Commercial string-scale optimizer evidence for dual MPPT inputs, DC-bus voltage matching, and 600-1500 V system voltage.
Commercial isolated multi-input DC/DC optimizer evidence with MPPT per input and customizable output voltage to a DC bus.
limitations: Commercial/utility string scale; not 300-600 W blind-scale hardware.

why_it_matters: Shows multiple SmartSolar charge controllers can charge one battery as one large charger while each controls its own output current.
limitations: Battery-bus architecture; not grid-tie BIPV MLPE.

why_it_matters: Gives VE.Smart network maximum of 10 devices and small-system scope.
limitations: Network limit is not the primary iWin limit; current/protection limit dominates.

why_it_matters: Gives 12/24/36/48 V battery support, 35 A output, 2 kW PV at 48 V, 150 V PV Voc, and PV voltage above battery requirement.
limitations: Buck charger; conflicts with 45 Vmp source charging a 48 V bus.

why_it_matters: Small boost MPPT controller evidence for lower-voltage PV charging 24/36/48 V battery packs; price anchor for 48 V model.
limitations: 350 W class and input limits are tight for iWin.

why_it_matters: Gives GVB-8 input range, current, Vmp/Voc recommendations, temperature, certifications, and non-isolated warning.
limitations: Not a grid/BIPV product; 48 V model limited to 350 W and recommended Vmp 43 V.

why_it_matters: Shows component/reference support for PV power optimizers, including 400 W buck-boost and 600 W buck reference designs.
limitations: Not finished electronics; certification and packaging required.

why_it_matters: 600 W optimizer reference with 15-80 V input, 18 A, buck/buck-boost options; close to iWin power class.
limitations: Reference design only; no enclosure/certification/product warranty.
